---
title: "Data"
editor: visual
---

Data used in this work:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| error: false
library(plotly)

labels <- c(
  "Data",
  "Risk mapping", "Real estate",
  "JMA", "J-SHIS", "MLIT", "LIFULL",
  "Earthquakes", "Coordinates/Magnitude",
  "Hazard maps", "Time evolution",
  "Property details",
  "Housing data", "Limitations"
)

parents <- c(
  "",
  "Data", "Data",
  "Risk mapping", "Risk mapping", "Real estate", "Real estate",
  "JMA", "JMA",
  "J-SHIS", "J-SHIS",
  "MLIT",
  "LIFULL", "LIFULL"
)

# 👉 valeurs cohérentes (parents > enfants)
values <- c(
  20,
  10, 10,
  5, 5, 5, 5,
  2, 3,
  2, 3,
  5,
  3, 2
)

fig <- plot_ly(
  labels = labels,
  parents = parents,
  values = values,
  type = "sunburst",
  branchvalues = "total",
  maxdepth = 3
)

fig
```
